name: Data Driven Decision Making: ตัดสินใจได้ดีขึ้นด้วย Data ทำยัง

name: Data-Driven Decision-Making: Using Data Analytics in Business
snippet: When data analytics is used to drive decision-making, businesses can enjoy improved accuracy and efficiency in their everyday operations. That’s because decisions are made based on facts and objective information, which takes some of the guesswork out of decision-making.
